description.content: Notification

Marks all unread notifications as read.

Available for any authorized user.

query.description: Delivery method

description.content:
Marks notification as read by its id.

Available for any authorized user.

Retrieves notification settings for this tenant or sysadmin.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

response.name: OK

description.content:
Returns preview for notification request.

`processedTemplates` shows how the notifications for each delivery method will look like for the first recipient of the corresponding notification target.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

query.description: Amount of the recipients to show in preview

item.name: Send Entity Limit Increase Request Notification to System Administrators (sendEntitiesLimitIncreaseRequest)

request.name: Send Entity Limit Increase Request Notification to System Administrators (sendEntitiesLimitIncreaseRequest)

description.content:
Send entity limit increase request notification by Tenant Administrator to System administrators.

Available for users with 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

query.description: (Required) Maximum amount of entities in a one page
(Required) Sequence number of page starting from 0
Case-insensitive 'substring' filter based on notification subject or text
Property of entity to sort by
Sort order. ASC (ASCENDING) or DESC (DESCENDING)
To search for unread notifications only
Delivery method

description.content:
Returns unread notifications count for chosen delivery method.

Available for any authorized user.

query.description: Delivery method

description.content:
Returns the page of notification requests submitted by users of this tenant or sysadmins.

You can specify parameters to filter the results. The result is wrapped with PageData object that allows you to iterate over result set using pagination. See response schema for more details. 

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

query.description: (Required) Maximum amount of entities in a one page
(Required) Sequence number of page starting from 0
Case-insensitive 'substring' filed based on the used template name
Property of entity to sort by
Sort order. ASC (ASCENDING) or DESC (DESCENDING)

response.name: OK

description.content:
Fetches notification request info by request id.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

response.name: OK

description.content:
Deletes notification request by its id.

If the request has status `SENT` - all sent notifications for this request will be deleted. If it is `SCHEDULED`, the request will be cancelled.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

Returns the list of delivery methods that are properly configured and are allowed to be used for sending notifications.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

Deletes notification by its id.

Available for any authorized user.
Notification Rule

Returns the page of notification rules.

You can specify parameters to filter the results. The result is wrapped with PageData object that allows you to iterate over result set using pagination. See response schema for more details. 

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

query.description: (Required) Maximum amount of entities in a one page
(Required) Sequence number of page starting from 0
Case-insensitive 'substring' filter based on rule's name
Property of entity to sort by
Sort order. ASC (ASCENDING) or DESC (DESCENDING)

response.name: OK

description.content:
Fetches notification rule info by rule's id.
In addition to regular notification rule fields, there are `templateName` and `deliveryMethods` in the response.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

Deletes notification rule by id.
Cancels all related scheduled notification requests (e.g. due to escalation table)

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.
Notification Target

description.content:
Returns the page of recipients for such notification target configuration.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

query.description: (Required) Maximum amount of entities in a one page
(Required) Sequence number of page starting from 0

description.content:
Returns the list of notification targets found by provided ids.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

query.description: (Required) Maximum amount of entities in a one page
(Required) Sequence number of page starting from 0
Case-insensitive 'substring' filed based on the target's name
Property of entity to sort by
Sort order. ASC (ASCENDING) or DESC (DESCENDING)
(Required) Comma-separated list of uuids representing targets ids
(Required) Comma-separated list of uuids representing targets ids

description.content:
Fetches notification target by id.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

Deletes notification target by its id.

This target cannot be referenced by existing scheduled notification requests or any notification rules.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.
Notification Template

Returns the page of notification templates owned by sysadmin or tenant.

You can specify parameters to filter the results. The result is wrapped with PageData object that allows you to iterate over result set using pagination. See response schema for more details. 

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

query.description: (Required) Maximum amount of entities in a one page
(Required) Sequence number of page starting from 0
Case-insensitive 'substring' filter based on template's name and notification type
Property of entity to sort by
Sort order. ASC (ASCENDING) or DESC (DESCENDING)
Comma-separated list of notification types to filter the templates
Comma-separated list of notification types to filter the templates

response.name: OK

description.content:
Fetches notification template by id.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

Deletes notification template by its id.

This template cannot be referenced by existing scheduled notification requests or any notification rules.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

List available Slack conversations by type.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

query.description: (Required)
Slack bot token. If absent - system Slack settings will be used

description.content:
ThingsBoard Notifications API — subset of the ThingsBoard REST API (open-source IoT platform). Covers: Notification, Notification Rule, Notification Target, Notification Template.

Contact Support:
 Name: ThingsBoard team
 Email: info@thingsboard.io
